evals.prompt: write onboarding email for altisport.cz, identifier: alt
evals.expected_output: Czech email for a single site with one generated Perselio script URL and an HTML head example.

evals.prompt: compose deployment email for EMOS - sites: emos.cz (ems), emos.sk (emssk), emos.hu (emshu)
evals.expected_output: Czech email for multiple sites with a list of generated Perselio script URLs and one HTML head example.

evals.prompt: write onboarding email in english for customer FashionUK, site: fashionuk.com, identifier: fuk
evals.expected_output: English email for a single site with one generated Perselio script URL and an HTML head example.
